# PERF-94 positive: io.ReadAll on Fiber RequestBodyStream
lang: go
file: PERF-094-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"io"
	"github.com/gofiber/fiber/v2"
)

func Ingest(c *fiber.Ctx) error {
	body, err := io.ReadAll(c.RequestBodyStream())
	if err != nil {
		return c.Status(400).SendString("bad request")
	}
	_ = body
	return c.SendString("ok")
}
